ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audit_signatures" (
  "signature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit signature */,
  "signature" TEXT /* Description of the audit event */,
  "signature_type" TEXT /* Type of the audit signature (e.g., system, application, security) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who created the signature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the signature was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "signature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the audit signature */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the event */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the action taken */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the result of the event */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "event_message" TEXT /* Short message describing the event */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Detailed data associated with the event (e.g., user input, system output) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_events_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES event_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_events_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES event_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_events_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES event_actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_events_signature_id FOREIGN KEY ("signature_id") REFERENCES audit_signatures ("signature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_string" TEXT /* String representation of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "result" TEXT /* Description of the event result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the system or entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the system or entity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the system or entity */,
  "entity_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_entities" (
  "event_entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-entity association */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the audit event */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the system entity involved */,
  "entity_role" TEXT /* Role of the entity in the event (e.g., source, target, affected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_entities_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES audit_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_entities_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES system_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_users" (
  "event_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-user association */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the audit event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account involved */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the event (e.g., initiator, affected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_users_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES audit_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the audit event */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reports_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES audit_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_notifications" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the audit event */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_content" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Recipient of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, delivered, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES audit_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change was made */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of the changes made (e.g., added, updated, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system status record */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the system (e.g., running, stopped, error) */,
  "status_message" TEXT /* Detailed message describing the system status */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the system status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session ended */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, inactive, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
